component.name: JDiskMark
component.summary: Measure the read and write performance of your storage devices

description.p: JDiskMark is a cross-platform disk benchmark utility written in Java. It provides a simple way to measure the read and write performance of storage devices including SSDs, NVMe drives, SD cards, and hard drives.
It is especially useful for gamers validating SD card and SSD upgrades on platforms like Steam Deck, Bazzite, and SteamOS.
